title: Research & Training | National Institutes of Health (NIH)
content: Research & Training Medical Research Initiatives Image ARPA-H, ACTIV, RADx, The BRAIN Initiative, Accelerating Medicines Partnership, and more. Explore research initiatives Science Highlights Image Highlights of scientific advances from the National Institutes of Health. Read Science Highlights Research in NIH Labs & Clinics A list of resources related to research performed in NIH labs and clinics. Research Resources A list of research resources at NIH. Clinical Research Resources A list of clinical research resources at NIH. Training Opportunities A list of links related to NIH training opportunities. Science Education Science education resources for students and educators. Library Resources A list of library resources from the National Library of Medicine, NIH Library, and NIEHS Library. Safety, Regulation & Guidance A list of resources related to safety, regulation, and guidance at NIH. Lasker Clinical Research Scholars An historic “intramural-extramural” partnership to nurture the next generation of clinical researchers. Anti-Sexual Harassment NIH does not tolerate pervasive or severe harassment of any kind, including sexual harassment. This page last reviewed on February 20, 2025
